functional_requirements.requirement: Track temperature, symptoms, medicine intake, and diet of registered patients.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Functionalities: temperature, symptoms, medicine intake and diet of the registered patient.

functional_requirements.requirement: View all information of patients from screening to discharge.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: All the information of the patients from screening to discharge can be viewed.
Medicines can also be prescribed to a specific patient.

functional_requirements.requirement: Allow COVID-19 patients to update data and checklist of medical shops in their locality.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: COVID-19 Patients: View the data shared by the doctor, home quarantined patients can update data and checklist of medical shops in their locality.

functional_requirements.requirement: Display number of people infected (symptomatic and asymptomatic) and death in user's locality.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Check the number of people infected (symptomatic and asymptomatic) and death in their locality ranging from current street, 500 m, 1 km, 5 km, 10 km

functional_requirements.requirement: Provide a blog where recovered persons can share their experience.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: view a blog where recovered persons share their experience.

functional_requirements.requirement: Allow COVID-19 Essentials Seller to stock up essentials like masks and gloves according to infection in an area.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: COVID-19 Essentials Seller: Can stock up essentials like masks and gloves according to infection in an area.

functional_requirements.requirement: List medical shops nearby the area for COVID-19 Essentials Seller.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Medical shops nearby the area will be listed.

functional_requirements.requirement: Assign workers to disinfect covid affected areas regularly based on infection data for Corporation Worker Head.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: workers will be assigned to disinfect covid affected areas regularly based on infection data

functional_requirements.requirement: Allow Admin to update current number of infected people in a locality.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Admin: updates current number of infected people in a locality.

prompt:
You are a requirements engineer.
Extract functional software requirements from the source text.

Return ONLY valid JSON with this schema:
{
  "functional_requirements": [
    {
      "requirement": "string",
      "evidence_quote": "short exact quote from source text"
    }
  ]
}

Rules:
1. Include only system capabilities/behaviors.
2. Exclude background context, impact statements, problem motivation, and pure business goals.
3. Keep each requirement atomic and clear.
4. Preserve original meaning. Do not invent functionality.
5. If uncertain, keep the item but keep evidence_quote explicit.

Source text:
<<<
The all in one COVID-19 management system simplifies the entire process of decreasing the
virus load in the community by digitalization. It includes tracking and treating COVID-19
patients and monitoring the spread of the virus. It aims to assist healthcare organizations and
governments to assess patient risk profiles and provide awareness to common people by connecting them with virtual care capabilities. With the current epidemiological situation of COVID-19,
there is a high demand to reduce contact between persons and digitize the whole process. This
will effectively reduce the infection rate, help the common people and empower medical professionals across the world to help more patients through telemedicine and virtual care.
Functionalities:
temperature, symptoms, medicine intake and diet of the registered patient. All the information of the patients from screening to discharge can be viewed. Medicines can also be
prescribed to a specific patient.
2. COVID-19 Patients: View the data shared by the doctor, home quarantined patients can
update data and checklist of medical shops in their locality.
3. Common People: Check the number of people infected (symptomatic and asymptomatic)
and death in their locality ranging from current street, 500 m, 1 km, 5 km, 10 km and view
a blog where recovered persons share their experience.
4. COVID-19 Essentials Seller: Can stock up essentials like masks and gloves according to
infection in an area. Medical shops nearby the area will be listed.
5. Corporation Worker Head:  workers will be assigned to disinfect covid affected areas  regularly based on infection data and update status.
6. Admin: updates current number of infected people in a locality.
>>>
